title: Initialize Python Project
description: Create requirements.txt and install fundamental dependencies including FastAPI, Uvicorn, LangChain, PyPDF, docx2txt, OpenAI, and ChromaDB.

title: Set up FastAPI Server
description: Create the main FastAPI application entry point (main.py) with a basic health check endpoint to verify the server runs.

title: Create PDF Loader Service
description: Implement a service module using LangChain's PyMuPDFLoader or PyPDFLoader to extract text content and basic metadata from PDF files.

title: Create DOCX Loader Service
description: Implement a service module using LangChain's Docx2txtLoader to extract text from Microsoft Word (.docx) documents.

title: Implement File Routing Logic
description: Create a utility to route incoming files to the appropriate loader based on the file extension (PDF or DOCX).

title: Configure Text Splitter
description: Set up LangChain's RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter with a chunk size of 1000 characters and appropriate overlap to break down documents.

title: Implement Chunking Logic
description: Combine the loaders and text splitter so that loaded raw documents are automatically chunked while retaining source metadata.

title: Initialize Embedding Model
description: Configure the OpenAI Embeddings model (e.g., text-embedding-3-small) to convert text chunks into vector representations.

title: Initialize Vector Database
description: Install supabase and vecs (or the standard Supabase Python client). Create ingestion/vector_store.py to instantiate a Supabase pgvector client for securely storing document chunks and their associated OpenAI embeddings.

title: Implement Storage Logic
description: Create the exact pipeline step that takes the chunked texts, embeds them using the embedding model, and persists them into the Vector DB.

title: Create API Endpoint for Ingestion
description: Build a FastAPI POST endpoint (e.g., /ingest) that accepts file uploads, processes them through the ingestion pipeline, and returns a success status.

title: Enhance Metadata Extraction
description: Ensure strict metadata parsing (filename, page numbers) is intact across all chunks before being inserted into the Vector DB for future citations.

title: Add Error Handling to Pipeline
description: Implement error boundaries in the ingestion API for unsupported file formats, corrupt files, or failures in the embedding/storage process.

title: Set up Query/Chat Endpoint
description: Implement the /query endpoint in main.py or create the LLM service module for Phase 2 generation.
